name: leadTimeAnalysis
_note: LENS_ACTIONS handler; reads artifact.data.orders. Computes per-order leadTimeDays from (receivedDate - orderDate)/86400000, then avg/min/max + reliability tier (excellent<=7, good<=14, acceptable<=30, else poor). Orders without receivedDate are filtered (pending). POISON: an unparseable date yields NaN leadTime which is filtered out, so avg stays finite. Component: SupplyChainActionPanel.actLead renders ordersAnalyzed/avgLeadTimeDays/minDays/maxDays/reliability. Not assassin-driven; pinned by server/tests/supplychain-lens-macros.test.js.
